summary_es: Este modulo construye el framework completo de ML probabilistico investigando cada termino de la regla de probabilidad inversa: prior (conocimiento previo), likelihood (compatibilidad datos-parametro), marginal likelihood (normalizacion) y posterior (conocimiento actualizado). Se aplica el framework completo a estimar la probabilidad de default de bonos corporativos high-yield, demostrando actualizacion secuencial trimestral donde el modelo aprende dinamicamente. Se introducen distribuciones predictivas prior y posterior: la prior predictive verifica la plausibilidad del modelo antes de ver datos, y la posterior predictive genera predicciones que propagan la incertidumbre parametrica. Se compara con NHST para mostrar que el enfoque bayesiano responde directamente la pregunta del inversor.
summary_en: This module builds the complete probabilistic ML framework by investigating each term of the inverse probability rule: prior (pre-data knowledge), likelihood (data-parameter compatibility), marginal likelihood (normalization), and posterior (updated knowledge). The framework is applied to estimating corporate high-yield bond default probability, demonstrating sequential quarterly updating where the model learns dynamically. Prior and posterior predictive distributions are introduced: prior predictive checks model plausibility before seeing data, and posterior predictive generates predictions that propagate parametric uncertainty. Comparison with NHST shows the Bayesian approach directly answers the investor's question.
learning_objectives_es: Investigar cada termino de la regla de probabilidad inversa con significado financiero
Estimar P(default) de bonos corporativos con actualizacion secuencial bayesiana
Generar distribuciones predictivas prior y posterior para verificar y predecir
Comparar el framework bayesiano con NHST para decisiones financieras
Calcular P(default > umbral) directamente desde el posterior
learning_objectives_en: Investigate each inverse probability rule term with financial meaning
Estimate bond default P(default) with sequential Bayesian updating
Generate prior and posterior predictive distributions for checking and predicting
Compare the Bayesian framework with NHST for financial decisions
Calculate P(default > threshold) directly from the posterior

parameters.name: Knowledge Integration via Priors
parameters.origin_phrase: Priors encode personal, empirical, and institutional knowledge into the model

parameters.name: Generative Predictive Distributions
parameters.origin_phrase: Posterior predictive generates plausible future scenarios with uncertainty

parameters.name: Transparent Inference
parameters.origin_phrase: Every assumption is explicit: prior, likelihood, posterior are all inspectable

parameters.name: Uncertainty Propagation
parameters.origin_phrase: Predictive distributions propagate parameter uncertainty into predictions
